d: Ramana, a simpleton from Guntur, cares for no one and keeps himself always busy in his work. Suddenly, his identity drags him into a political conspiracy against Minister of Law and Justice, Vasundhara. He is left with two options - he either gives up that identity or fights against the conspirators.
Top IAF aviators come together in the face of imminent danger, to form Air Dragons. Fighter unfolds their camaraderie, brotherhood and battles, internal and external.

t: Teri Baaton Mein Aisa Uljha Jiya
d: An impossible love story. Experience love, family and robots. A fun filled entertainer. Book now!

Shekhar and Suman are set to tie the knot the following day. Shekhar seems overly enthusiastic about the arranged marriage, but just before the sangeet sandhya ceremony, Suman discovers that Shekhar is not in love with her. Heartbroken, she decides to call off the wedding.

The second half of the movie is about how the bride and groom`s family get embroiled in their argument and how Shekhar attempts to persuade her that he truly loves her and wants to marry her. What made Suman feel that Shekhar is not in love with her? What happens next, leads to a rollercoaster laugh riot.
Voodoo is Back is a Horror movie directed by Visal Sen.

t: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu No Yaiba - To The Hashira Training
d: Tanjiro undergoes rigorous training with the Stone Hashira, Himejima, in his quest to become a Hashira. Meanwhile, Muzan continues to search for Nezuko and Ubuyashiki.
Aadhi Naath is a Hindi movie starring Vijay, Trisha Krishnan, Prakash Raj and Saikumar Pudipeddi in prominent roles. It is directed by Ramanaa

Follow the misadventures of two young brides who get lost from the same train! From mistaken identities to laugh-out-aloud escapades, the ensuing chaos guarantees laughter galore and heartwarming moments.

Join the lovable Laapataa Ladies on their funny yet moving journey of self-discovery, womanhood and life itself.
An adventure racer adopts a stray dog named Arthur to join him in an epic endurance race.
Sir Nicholas `Nicky` Winton, a young London broker who, in the months leading up to World War II, rescued over 600 children from Nazi-occupied Czechoslovakia.
Based on a very famous play "YAHAN AMEENA BIKTI HAI", the film is based on a true life story of Ameena who is sold by her parents to an eighty year old Arab for the sake of money.

Kavya and Ani, an estranged couple in their late thirties, are having quiet affairs with two sexy outsiders to allay the boredom in their own marriage. However, when a trip to Kavya`s hometown for a funeral reignites their chemistry, Kavya and Ani are keen to make their marriage work. Tables turn when they start dodging their lovers to be with each other.

In Crystal Peaks forest, bear cubs Briar and Bramble lose their mother, Barbara, in a fire. Determined to find her, they meet Charlotte, whose amber stone gives them hope. Amidst challenges, they discover a Scrap Rebel member who resembles their lost mother. This revelation drives them to confront the truth, leading to victory and uncovering life-changing secrets.

t: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes
d:
Set several generations in the future following Caesar`s reign, where apes are the dominant species living harmoniously and humans have been reduced to living in the shadows.

As a new tyrannical ape leader builds his empire, one young ape undertakes a harrowing journey that will cause him to question all that he has known about the past and to make choices that will define a future for apes and humans alike.

Garfield is about to go on a wild outdoor adventure. After an unexpected reunion with his long-lost father - the cat Vic - Garfield and Odie are forced to abandon their pampered life to join Vic in a hilarious, high-stakes heist.
Retired Dysp Udhayabhanu narrates events of his professional life in a TV program. He reveals the intriguing details of the 'Chepanamthota case', a milestone event in his career.

ACP Kiran goes beyond the set of rules to follow her gut feeling only to realize the system doesn`t take her instincts seriously. Notwithstanding the rules she walks into complex and intriguing situations, finding unusual answers to usual questions.

Disney and Pixar`s "Inside Out 2" returns to the mind of newly minted teenager Riley just as headquarters is undergoing a sudden demolition to make room for something entirely unexpected: new emotions! Joy, Sadness, Anger, Fear and Disgust, who`ve long been running a successful operation by all accounts, aren`t sure how to feel when Anxiety shows up. And it looks like she`s not alone.

A barber`s life revolves only around two aspects: his duty to do his job and his daughter, a budding sports champ. One day, Maharaja finds himself in a police station to file an FIR because Lakshmi, their dustbin, has been stolen. What is actually going on and where does this story lead?

t: T20 World Cup 2024 - Semi Final 2: India Vs England
d: Book your tickets for a special screening of T20 World Cup 2024 Semi-Final 2: India Vs England.
Asgaar is a Garhwali movie starring  Abhinav Chauhan, Manvi Patel, Rakesh Gaur and Madan Duklan in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Anuj Joshi.
Raghav works diligently at a tourist office, saving money for his dream honeymoon in Paris. Accidentally, he meets and marries Anandhi. How will he face the challenges that arise?
Dushman the hum hi apne, auron mein kahan dum tha. Bound by fate. Defined by love!
The journey of a young diplomat, belonging to a prominent family of patriots, who gets embroiled in a dangerous personal conspiracy far from her home, at a career-defining post.
The story revolves around a cop, his enthusiastic housewife with a social media obsession, and the lurking dangers of digital worlds including stalking and invasion of privacy.

The hilarious revelation of the shocking fact that your friends and spouses, are nothing more than masked strangers, dwelling behind a phony pile of lies... sometimes just needs one game!

That game is now on!

t: Vaazha - Biopic of a Billion Boys
d: Ajo, Vishnu, Moosa, and the team are labeled as `losers`. As they enter adulthood, the pressures from parents and society become overwhelming. Ultimately, love triumphs over judgement in this emotional tale of self-discovery and acceptance.

A sequel to iSmart Shankar, Double iSmart follows a gangster who arrives in India to avenge the murder of his mother. However, in a tragic twist of fate, he gets diagnosed by brain tumour. What follows next forms the crux of the story.

It is the story of a young woman who fought back, steered, and championed by the one man she believed was her saviour, who became her weapon. It is the story of a man who found himself while helping Vedaa find justice.

Inside his book, adventurous Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the book's pages and into the physical world, Harold finds that he has a lot to learn
A proud and traditional family tries everything to protect their reputation from being destroyed by nosy people in their society. To what extent will they go to uphold their image?
Transformers One is the untold origin story of sworn enemies Optimus Prime and Megatron. But once are bonded like brothers, they change the fate of Cybertron forever.

A brilliant student Surya wants to make his parents proud by something for his country and society. Surya falls in love with his classmate Rani and Ranis father threatens Surya to stay away from his daughter, but Surya is not intimidated. What will happen when fate gets him to a destination from where it is not possible to return?

Soumendu Sanyal, a kind-hearted teacher, and his daughter Sharmila, a social worker, bond through a happy family. After a year of getting married to Koustav, one night Sharmila is brutally raped by business tycoon Saibal Banerjee`s son Roni and his friends. Soumendu launches a court case against them, and they are declared innocent. The story explores the emotional bond between father and daughter.

The film`s backdrop is centered around the far and forgotten coastal lands of  India.The people,or rather the villains,in the film neither fear death nor god and there is no sense of humanity among them. Devara changes this scenario in his inimitable style.

Martin is a pulse pounding edge of the seat action thriller. A character whose dramatic journey takes him to the length and breadth of the country to fight against evil forces lurking to destroy India. But he is also in love with a beautiful lass. His journey is of discovering himself, finding love and fighting for his motherland.  Can he hold the fort on all three gates?
Dolle is a Konkani movie starring Bernard Fernandes, Peter Alistair Rodrigues and Valanka Martins in prominent roles. It is directed by Rajesh Kundaikar.
Gear up to tickle your funny bones with some thrill. The gates of `haveli` will now open again for Bhool Bhulaiyaa 3!

In the third installment of Singham series, the valiant cop Bajirao Singham and his team of brave hearts embark on a cross-border mission to rescue his beloved wife, Avni Singham, who has been abducted by a formidable antagonist. Upholding its legacy of never letting you down-never has, never will-this installment promises a fierce battle between good and evil. This timeless struggle will once again be fought through the indomitable spirit of Bajirao Singham. The legendary roar that began 13 years ago continues to resonate in the hearts of the audience.
Prepare to witness, epic emotions, raw rage, primal courage, ruthless revenge in its purest form.
Inspired by true events that took place in the `Sabarmati Express` on the morning of 27 Feb 2002.

In 2002 Gujarat, terrorist threats targeted key officials, leading to counter-operations by officers like ADG Rathore. During an encounter, Muskan, a college student from Mumbai, was killed. Trapped by her association with Waseem, Muskan was blackmailed into terrorist activities, despite her attempts to escape. What follows next?

Durga, a village girl from Gopalpur, faces hardship when the government`s factory acquisition threatens her family`s land. Amid financial struggles, her mother moves to Kolkata for Durga`s education, but poverty almost halts her studies. A new government program, Sukanya, supports her education, helping her rise to become an IPS officer, celebrated as the first Sukanya of the state.

Misunderstood because of her green skin, a young woman named Elphaba forges an unlikely but profound friendship with Glinda, a student with an unflinching desire for popularity. Following an encounter with the Wizard of Oz, their relationship soon reaches a crossroad as their lives begin to take very different paths.

Parakramam follows Vishak, a young man striving to become an Army major. Despite facing bullying and a strained relationship with his mother, he draws strength from his father and friends. With the help of a budding romance, Vishak gains confidence, but a series of events challenge his journey of becoming an army commando.

The Great Gujarati Matrimony is a romantic drama that follows the intertwined lives of Iti, an aspiring actress, Raaghav, a lively matrimony agency owner, and Ved, an investment banker from Canada. As they navigate love, cultural clashes, and self-discovery, their journey explores the complexities of relationships and personal growth.

After receiving an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors, Moana journeys alongside Maui and a new crew to the far seas of Oceania and into dangerous, long-lost waters for an adventure unlike anything she`s ever faced.

The story revolves around Jinpura, a remote village surrounded by jungles and mountains, where an unknown evil power wipes out its entire population, leaving only a few survivors who were away during the incident. Despite government attempts to investigate, all efforts fail, and Jinpura is declared a forbidden area. Years later, seven friends and their professor`s wife mock the warnings and decide to visit the cursed village, dragging their hesitant professor along. Will they uncover the truth and survive this perilous journey, or succumb to the mysterious evil lurking in Jinpura?

Pushpa 2: The Rule picks up from the explosive events of the first part, following Pushpa`s meteoric rise as he expands his red sandalwood empire beyond borders. As tensions escalate with rival factions and the authorities, his growing ambitions draw him into intense confrontations and political upheavals.

Note: The Tamil version of Pushpa 2 has a confirmed runtime of 3 hours 20 minutes. Please be advised that the additional 20 minutes of footage is currently not available.

In this action-packed drama, Guru seeks revenge by kidnapping Arumai, a powerful state Finance Minister he holds responsible for his beloved's death. However, the plan faces unexpected challenges when two unconventional detectives take charge of the investigation, leading to an intense game of cat and mouse.

Two cousins strive to reclaim their ancestral home, overcoming numerous obstacles with help from a doctor and lawyer. This heartfelt journey celebrates family bonds, blending tradition with the spirit of modern life.

"Mufasa: The Lion King" enlists Rafiki to relay the legend of the unlikely rise of the beloved king of the Pride Lands, introducing an orphaned cub called Mufasa, a sympathetic lion named Taka - the heir to a royal bloodline - and their expansive journey alongside an extraordinary group of misfits.
A story of fearless souls, armed with their bravery and intelligence, not only shapes their own fate but also rewrites the destiny of a coalfield at the Damodar Valley.
Darling Pyar Jhukta Nahi 2 is a Chattisgarhi movie starring Amlesh Nagesh, Diksha Jaiswal and Anshul Awasthi in prominent roles. It is directed by Bharti Verma.

Atlee`s Baby John, starring Varun Dhawan, Jackie Shroff, Wamiqa Gabbi and Keerthy Suresh, is a high-octane action thriller that follows a fearless cop leading a double life to protect his daughter from a deadly underworld.
When the world is taken over by darkness. A force will rise.
